signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts.**[1]

signals.headline: Tennessee Advances Bitcoin Reserve Legislation | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Tennessee Advances Bitcoin Reserve Legislation | YES | MED confidence**  
Tennessee is moving toward a Bitcoin reserve with public fund rules, part of state-level adoption trend alongside XRP reserve talks—could shift sentiment on crypto as treasury assets[2]. No ultra-recent (post-April 16) confirmations resolved in results for today (April 17), limiting "RIGHT NOW" impact[1][2][3].
